enchantment.rinvenium.rush.desc:
The Envinium Spear will charge over time, 
allowing the user to rush forward at great speeds on right-click.
death.attack.boop.player: %s was peppered a thousand times by %s
desc.spear.unenchanted_1: Holding right-click allows the Envinium Spear to parry attacks,
desc.spear.unenchanted_2: knocking entities back and gives the user an attack buff.
desc.spear.unenchanted_3: Attacking in a certain time frame will increase the damage by 50%.
desc.spear.enchanted_1: [Debug] If the dash does not work, right-click while sneaking to reset the timers.
sound.rinvenium.hail_of_the_gods.shoot: Hail of the Gods goes BBRRRTT
